base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of waterfall_sniper — a character from 1987 contra. Waterfall-stage enemy — swims or clings to wall. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Waterfall-stage enemy — swims or clings to wall
